sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71056" key="nosokomei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νοσο-κομεῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n71056.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">infirmary, hospital,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cod.Just.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.2.15.1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl>: late word for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ξενών,</foreign> acc. to Sch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:79" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.79</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
